message:
chore(beads): Close bd-1al overlay system implementation

Closes bd-1al after implementing the complete overlay system for
demo_showcase with:
- OverlayManager with animation state
- HelpState, PaletteState, TourState
- draw_pass_overlays with backdrop dimming
- Glass panels with alpha blending
- Double-line decorative borders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
